name: Marshmellow Clouds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
2. In another large bowl, whisk together the brown sugar and butter until combined.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla extract to the sugar mixture, stirring well.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips, marshmallows, and pecans.
6. Using a spoon or piping bag, take a heaping tablespoon of dough and wrap it completely around each frozen marshmallow.
7. Place the wrapped marshmallows about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes, or until set.
End of Instructions
